hooks.command: node -e "let d='';process.stdin.on('data',c=>d+=c).on('end',()=>{try{console.log(JSON.parse(d).tool_input.file_path||'')}catch(e){}})" | { read -r f; [ -n "$f" ] && npx eslint --fix "$f"; } 2>/dev/null || true

f="$(node -e "let d='';process.stdin.on('data',c=>d+=c).on('end',()=>{try{console.log(JSON.parse(d).tool_input.file_path||'')}catch(e){}})")"; if echo "$f" | grep -qE '\.(env|pem|key)$'; then echo 'BLOCK: sensitive file' >&2; exit 2; fi
